{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Subspace madness
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Subspace madness]] is a condition where pilots stare into the colors of [[Subspace]] for too long, often leading to them ejecting.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c7">''The Captain'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Subspace madness]] is a fascination with patterns visible through [[Subspace]] that causes pilots to pilot themselves elsewhere.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
